summary: The hardening tranche reads as complete. The reviewed docs align with the shipped implementation for workspace settings, owner-only deletion guards, the mixed public showroom, public note reading, and upgrade-safe runtime behavior. Regression coverage is substantive across those fronts, and the provided deterministic run shows `npm run verify` passing end to end.
satisfied_exit_criteria: Reviewed AGENTS.md plus the requested security, reliability, frontend, product-spec, active-plan, and related design-doc surfaces; no substantive doc drift remains across settings, deletion, public reading, public showroom, Docker/operator packaging context, and upgrade safety.

Regression coverage protects the new fronts: settings have unit plus E2E coverage, deletion has service-boundary unit guards plus E2E confirmation/read-only/published-state coverage, public showroom and public note reading have dedicated UI/E2E coverage, and upgrade safety is protected by `db:prepare` unit coverage plus the legacy-upgrade `start:smoke` path.

The deterministic check summary shows `npm run verify` succeeded with lint, `db:prepare`, typecheck, build, 51 unit tests, 80 Playwright tests, and the two-stage production-style smoke including legacy SQLite backup and upgrade proof.
